messages.body: Hello, you've reached New Beginnings Baltimore. Our hours are Monday and Wednesday 10 to 6, Tuesdays, Thursdays, noon to 8, and Fridays 9 to 2. Please leave a message and we'll return your call. Thank you.

Hello Linda, Good evening!  I found your salon on Groupon, and I’m assuming I’m speaking to the owner- apologies in advance if I got the name wrong, I actually tried checking your GBP before messaging you!  This is Simar…
Hi Linda,  As discussed over the call, I’ve raised the request for the cancellation, I’ll keep you posted once it’s done!

Hello, thanks Baltimore. Hi I was looking to have a word with the owner of the place. Is she available? I know I'm sorry she's not. Can I take a message? Okay do you know where she might be available so I can have a word…

Hi Linda, Hope you’re doing well!  Yes, i just heard about your decision to close the business — I completely understand, though I’d really appreciate a quick call before we proceed with the cancellation. Maybe we can ex…

Shika…. I dont know if you got the messsge but im shutting down my business as of mid december so i sm no longer in need of your service… i emsiled zoca on fridsy to cancel and i got sn emsil from them telling me when th…
There is not a way to make things work …
Also, Linda I am not able to access the spreadsheet which you shared on email.

Hi Linda, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major Indian festival Diwali, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able …

Subject: Re: MOM - New Beginnings Baltimore\n\nBody: Hi Linda, Please review the attached RCA. I'd appreciate your thoughts on whether we should consider running some offers to improve business outcomes. Best regards…
Hey Linda,  We have updated the cover image, on your GBP - please do review once!
Hi Linda,  I have escalated this my team, please allow us sometime to get this updated! Will update you once done!
Shikha…. I thought you were going to have the google pic changed…. Nothing has happened yet
